<!-- PR title must start with a conventional-commit prefix (feat:, fix:, chore:,
     docs:, refactor:, test:, ci:, perf:) — it drives automated versioning. -->

## Reason for change

<!-- Why does this change exist? Link the issue if there is one: Closes #NN -->

## Scope

<!-- Which packages/apps are impacted, and how big is the blast radius?
     e.g. packages/dsp (new extractor), apps/playground (new panel) -->

- [ ] `packages/core`
- [ ] `packages/dsp`
- [ ] `packages/browser`
- [ ] `plugins/dtmf`
- [ ] `apps/playground`
- [ ] docs / tooling / CI

## Verification

<!-- How do we know it works? Checks run (lint/typecheck/test/build), plus any
     runtime verification: what you drove in the playground, what you observed,
     screenshots where visuals changed. "Tests pass" alone is rarely enough. -->
